reviews.review_description: I've been using EHSVR's applications for years and I'm impressed by their continuous development. They currently offer over 40 applications, and their number is constantly growing. EHS Academy is a real blast! The intuitive hand control is incredibly convenient, and the offline mode is an invaluable feature, especially during training sessions. What's more, thanks to the availability of both shorter and longer applications, I can flexibly select them according to the size of the groups, which significantly eliminates the problem of waiting in line

As someone responsible for occupational health and safety training in our company, I came across the EHS VR website by chance – and I’m really glad I did. The site is clear, informative, and truly shows how modern safety training can be. I especially like that each VR application is thoroughly described, with videos showing how it works in practice.

The offer itself is impressive – not just classic fire safety or first aid training, but also specialized scenarios like working in confined spaces or responding to chemical spills.

The EHS VR team was also very professional – they responded quickly to my questions and offered a demo of the application. That made it much easier to convince management to invest in it.

I recommend EHS VR to anyone looking for something beyond boring lectures – this is a whole new level of safety education.
Thanks to EHS Academy quality of my HSE training improved significantly. This is not only fun way to train employees but also a great tool.
